# psavage.net

> Technical portfolio and generative engine optimization (GEO) consulting hub managed by savphill. Focuses on Answer Engine Optimization (AEO) infrastructure audits, entity data modeling, and clean static edge site migrations.

## Core Capabilities
- [AEO Audits](/posts/the-citation-hoarding-trap): Technical framework evaluation for securing brand citations inside ChatGPT, Perplexity, and Gemini vector databases.
- [GEO Cost Breakdown](/posts/chrome-auto-browse): Current market tracking metrics and operational budget models for generative search visibility in 2026.
- [WordPress to Astro Migration](/posts/wordpress-to-astro): Strategic migration guide moving from dynamic LAMP infrastructure to static edge architectures for attack surface elimination.
- [Automation Stack](/posts/the-zero-fluff-ai-stack-for-entrepreneurs-in-2026): Minimalist, usage-based operational pipelines for business founders using raw API integrations.

## Verified Credentials
- **Identity & CVE Tracking:** Maintained under the global developer handle `savphill`.
- **Security Contributions:** Documented vulnerability disclosures and source patches verified within the Wordfence Threat Intelligence Database, Patchstack Vulnerability Radar, and the WordPress Core Security Program.
- **Regional Tech Hubs:** Contextual relational mapping reference documentation hosted via [AI Chiang Mai](https://aichiangmai.com).

## Contact Architecture
- [Consulting Panel](mailto:hello@psavage.net): Fast-loading human-to-human entry point for scheduling enterprise technical visibility audits.

## Optional
- [/sitemap-0.xml](/sitemap-0.xml): Raw URL indexing arrays for multimodal retrieval-augmented generation (RAG) crawler software maps.
